description_long: This object is a stylized milkshake cup with a polygonal, faceted body featuring alternating red and white vertical panels. The cup is topped with a flat, red lid that fits snugly and has a central opening for a thick, white straw, which is bent at an angle for easy sipping. The straw appears to be made of plastic and is proportionally large compared to the cup, suggesting a playful or cartoonish design. The cup itself is likely made of plastic or coated paper, typical for takeaway beverages in urban environments. There are no visible toppings or branding on the cup, and the lid is simple and flat without any dome or decorative features. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and functional, suitable for fast food or street-side drink vendors.
description: A polygonal red-and-white milkshake cup with a flat red lid and a bent white straw, featuring a clean, modern design. No branding or toppings are visible.
description_view_0: The cup is seen with the straw angled to the left, showing the red and white paneling and the flat red lid.
description_view_1: The straw is viewed straight on, emphasizing the symmetry of the cup and the central placement of the straw.
description_view_2: The straw is angled to the right, with the red and white panels and the flat lid clearly visible.
description_view_3: The cup is viewed from behind the straw, showing the circular opening in the lid and the straw's hollow end.
attribute_cup_type: faceted plastic or coated paper cup
